selections.name: Ever So Ready
selections.reason: Highest rated with race experience. Boxed on well last start and handles soft conditions.

selections.name: Dolly Boom
selections.reason: Good debut effort placing third. Top trainer/jockey combo and draws well.

selections.name: Home Tomurra
selections.reason: Showed ability in trials and gets the inside barrier advantage for debut.

selections.name: Berzelius
selections.reason: Freedman debutant with a good draw. Watch the market for stable confidence.

danger_horse.name: Run Like A Girl
danger_horse.reason: Gets weight relief and has placed on soft ground previously.

selections.name: Swing State
selections.reason: Gets the inside draw advantage, top trainer, and looks ready to peak third-up.

selections.name: Tszyuya
selections.reason: Consistent performer from the Gollan yard. Draws well and handles soft tracks.

selections.name: Big Tech
selections.reason: Placed on soft ground before and is knocking on the door for a win.

selections.name: Crypto Magic
selections.reason: Inside draw and placed recently over this track and distance.

danger_horse.name: Western Lights
danger_horse.reason: Gollan trained and draws well, capable of improvement.

selections.name: The Aviator
selections.reason: Good draw, consistent form, and avoids the heavy weight penalty on soft ground.

selections.name: Delicious Derek
selections.reason: Waller trained, gets the inside draw, and has solid soft track form.

selections.name: Saturdays Girl
selections.reason: Waller runner who is a consistent placer with plenty of soft track experience.

selections.name: Woodrow
selections.reason: Has ability but carries top weight on a soft track which is a penalty.

danger_horse.name: Kalamia King
danger_horse.reason: Emergency runner that could surprise if gaining a start.

selections.name: Weona Redwood
selections.reason: Excellent soft track record (4:2-0-0) and gets a favorable draw.

selections.name: June
selections.reason: Consistent performer, draws well, and handles soft conditions perfectly.

selections.name: Delrico
selections.reason: Waller trained, gets the inside draw advantage, and has soft track form.

selections.name: Galway Flyer
selections.reason: Last start winner for Waller. Wide draw is a slight negative but has the class.

danger_horse.name: Vermilion Kirin
danger_horse.reason: Solid soft track record and can bounce back from last run.

selections.name: Mosamour
selections.reason: Last start winner for Waller, gets the inside draw, and handles soft ground.

selections.name: Chillaxing
selections.reason: Gollan trained, good draw, and has proven soft track form.

selections.name: Rock Ya
selections.reason: Draws well and is a very consistent type in this grade.

selections.name: Dream Thinker
selections.reason: Last start winner for Gollan, stepping up but in good form.

danger_horse.name: Let's Do It Again
danger_horse.reason: Good draw and has soft track form to be competitive.

selections.name: War Is Brutal
selections.reason: Last start winner, gets a good draw, and looks highly progressive.

selections.name: Canara
selections.reason: Waller trained, gets the inside draw advantage, and is very consistent.

selections.name: Navy Nina
selections.reason: Gollan trained and consistent, but top weight on soft ground is a slight penalty.

selections.name: Some Style
selections.reason: Another Gollan runner with consistent form and soft track experience.

danger_horse.name: Wexford Miss
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and has placed on soft ground previously.

selections.name: Rewrite
selections.reason: Freedman trained, soft track winner, and looks highly progressive.

selections.name: Kadesky
selections.reason: Waller trained, gets the inside draw, and comes off a last start win.

selections.name: Sinatra
selections.reason: Good draw and is a proven soft track winner.

selections.name: Duomo
selections.reason: Consistent type with good recent form.

danger_horse.name: Puff 'N' Harry
danger_horse.reason: Draws well and has shown ability in limited starts.

selections.name: Saint Aldwyn
selections.reason: Gets the inside draw, highly progressive, and brings good form.

selections.name: Araletta
selections.reason: Good draw and handles soft conditions well.

selections.name: Apollo Ten
selections.reason: Inside draw and is a consistent winner in this grade.

selections.name: Heyoka
selections.reason: Consistent placer on soft ground.

danger_horse.name: Oriente
danger_horse.reason: Has ability but carries top weight on soft ground.
